title: Building a 2D Platformer in Godot 4 — Complete Beginner Tutorial
description:
Learn how to build a complete 2D platformer game from scratch using Godot 4. In this tutorial, we cover player movement, jumping, collision detection, enemies, and collectibles.

Timestamps:
0:00 - Project setup
2:30 - Player scene
8:15 - Movement and physics
15:00 - Jump mechanics
22:30 - Tilemaps and level design
31:00 - Enemies
40:00 - Collectibles
47:00 - UI and menus
55:00 - Building and exporting
